data.name: Dark Prodigy Simulator
data.detailed_description:
Dark Prodigy Simulator

Step into the robes of the Dark Lord, one of the most powerful warriors to ever exist. Your solitude is broken when a gifted yet dangerous exile , a young White Warrior cast out from her Academy...seeks you out.

She is hungry for power, desperate to surpass everything she once was, and she has chosen you as her master.

Will you shape her into the perfect weapon of darkness, or will her ambition outgrow even you?

Dark Lord: The Fallen Apprentice is a cinematic Simulator/RPG featuring:

  • An immersive, character-driven storyline
    Train a prodigy who has already mastered every path of her Academy, but still craves forbidden knowledge.

  • Moral corruption system
    Every lesson you teach her will bring her closer to the darkness — but can you control what you unleash?

  • Train, test, and evolve your apprentice
    Push her through missions, duels, and trials that will determine if she becomes your loyal blade… or a rival.

  • Unlock forbidden powers
    Shadow manipulation, destructive telekinetics, and abilities the Academy dared never teach.

  • Dynamic relationship
    Build trust, break her spirit, or let her ambition grow unchecked. Her fate is tied to your choices.

  • A destiny in your hands
    Will she become your greatest triumph… or the one who destroys you?

Forge your apprentice. Shape the future.
Evil is taught and you are the teacher.

Even though the game is complete, I plan to do individual updates to expand on the character routes.

data.short_description: Train a prodigy who has already mastered every path of her Academy, but still craves forbidden knowledge.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 3 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
